hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const c=i.tool_input?.content||i.tool_input?.new_string||'';const lines=c.split('\n').length;if(lines>800){console.error('[HP] WARNING: File exceeds 800 lines ('+lines+'). Consider splitting.');} if(/console\.log/.test(c)){console.error('[HP] WARNING: console.log detected. Remove before commit.');} console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: [Hyper-Pipeline] Quality gate: warn about large files and console.log

hooks.command: echo '[HP] Feature committed. Check docs/SPRINT-CONTRACT.md for next feature.' >&2

PostToolUse.description: [Hyper-Pipeline] Post-commit: remind to check sprint contract

hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];const log='docs/SESSION-LOG.md';const entry='
## Session '+d+'
Session ended. Check docs/ for latest state.
';try{fs.mkdirSync('docs',{recursive:true});fs.appendFileSync(log,entry)}catch(e){}"
